prompt_used: Story: The Harvest Men (the-harvest-men) | Hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight. | Subgenre: folk horror | Tone: SLOW_BURN | Location: Isolated valley communes and threshing grounds | Villain: The Reaper Steward | Villain worldview: Communities survive only through chosen sacrifice. | Motifs: corn husk knots, lantern smoke, harvest blades. Compose ending score cue for "Corruption Pact" that supports summary "You preserve the rite in exchange for selective immunity." and epilogue "You keep control of the case, and the villain keeps control of you.".
